cards.front: What does EMPNO stand for in a DATABASE MANAGEMENT SYSTEM?

cards.back: To uniquely identify an employee in the database

cards.front: What is the typical length of an EMPNO?

cards.back: Yes, it is used to uniquely identify each employee

cards.front: Can EMPNO be used for other purposes?
cards.back: Yes, it can be used for other purposes such as tracking benefits or leave
